name: referral-program
description: When the user wants to design, launch, or optimize an in-app referral / invite / share-to-earn program — including reward structure, mechanics, fraud prevention, deep link setup, and viral coefficient measurement. Use when the user mentions "referral program", "invite a friend", "refer and earn", "share to earn", "viral loop", "viral coefficient", "K-factor", "double-sided rewards", "give X get X", "referral rewards", "invite link", "share sheet", "Branch referrals", "in-app invites", or "how to
author: Eronred
